comment: Best chocolate café in Tirupur! The Belgian Dark Hot Chocolate is absolutely divine.
Loved the ambiance and the Death by Chocolate cake was amazing. Will visit again!
The fondue experience was phenomenal. Perfect for a family outing. Highly recommended!
Food was good but the waiting time was a bit long. Service could improve.
Hands down the best waffles I have ever had. The chocolate sauce is heavenly!
Great place for chocolate lovers. The truffle collection box makes a perfect gift.
Portions could be bigger for the price. Taste was okay but not exceptional.
The lava cake with ice cream is a must-try! Beautiful café décor too.
Wonderful desserts and the staff is very friendly. My kids loved the churros!
Authentic Belgian chocolate experience right here in Tirupur. Outstanding quality!
